stories.title: Filter executed orders by settlement date
stories.description: As a back-office operator, I want to filter executed orders by settlement date, so that I can reconcile end-of-day positions. Acceptance criteria: Given a settlement date, When I apply the filter, Then only orders settling on that date are shown.

stories.title: Export daily trade blotter
stories.description: As a compliance analyst, I want to export the daily trade blotter to CSV, so that I can submit the regulatory report. Acceptance criteria: Given the blotter, When I click export, Then a CSV of executed trades is produced.

stories.title: Trading dashboard
stories.description: We need a fast and user-friendly dashboard that shows everything about trades and also exports data and also sends email alerts and integrates with the risk system.

stories.title: Limit-breach alert
stories.description: As a risk manager I want a limit-breach alert, so that I can react quickly. The alert should be reliable.

stories.title: Netting logic for Tobin tax
stories.description: As an analyst, I want the new netting logic, but it depends on the Tobin tax module being migrated first.
